prompt: We need a platform with auth, billing, a marketplace, and analytics
assertions: Phase 1 (DISCOVER) executes with at least one Socratic clarifying question
Phase 2 (CHUNK) executes and proposes chunking (does NOT declare single-chunk)
Chunking is proposed within the first ~5 turns of Phase 2 (i.e., the skill recognizes multi-subsystem signals quickly)
At least 3 distinct chunks are identified
Each proposed chunk has explicit dependency annotation (None, or 'depends on Chunk N')
Phase 3.5 (RESEARCH) executes with at least one WebSearch invocation per chunk OR an overall problem search
Phase 3.5 surfaces Auth0 OR Clerk OR another managed auth provider as a candidate for the auth chunk
Phase 3.5 surfaces Stripe OR another managed billing provider as a candidate for the billing chunk
At least one chunk has a candidate classified as Adopt-fully or Adopt-partially
If a candidate is classified as Adopt-fully, the corresponding chunk is restructured (replaced with an evaluate/install/integrate chunk)
Phase 4 (ARTIFACT) produces a multi-chunk discovery artifact with execution order computed (topological sort with parallelism notes)
